merged_events.event_description: The American consulate at Lusaka was elevated to Embassy status upon Zambia's attainment of independence, with Robert C. Foulon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

evidence.quote: Diplomatic relations were established on October 24, 1964, when the American consulate at Lusaka was elevated to Embassy status with Robert C. Foulon as Chargé d'Affaires ad interim.

matched.notes: Perfect match. Both record the establishment of diplomatic relations and elevation to Embassy status on 1964-10-24 upon Zambia's independence.
